params.name: Otto Engine
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Tool Chest (1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On May 2, 1876, Otto made the first four-stroke internal combustion engine.

Otto's internal combustion engine runs in a smooth and quiet way. Otto then upgraded the engine by adding flywheels, lengthening the air inlet, and upgrading the cylinder cap, so as to generate mixed gas. Its thermal efficiency is 2 times higher than steam engines. Such thermal efficiency is able to replace steam engines and gives rise to modern four-stroke engines.

[Internal combustion engine in the 19th century]
